title: ConfidenceModel
description: The canonical shape of a confidence assessment, embeddable on any information-bearing platform object per the Confidence Everywhere principle. This schema is the normative definition; contracts/common/common-defs.schema.json#/$defs/confidenceRef mirrors it for embedding via $ref.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this score/level was assigned.

method.description: The named method or model that produced this assessment, e.g. 'manual_review', 'identifier_resolution'.

assessed_by.description: The human or agent_id that produced the assessment.

examples.rationale: Three independent public sources corroborate the identifier link.
